windows.title: GridCode — Bloomberg Terminal for Claude Code

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Bloomberg Terminal for Claude Code — multi-session AI terminal multiplexer
bundle.longDescription: GridCode is a desktop terminal multiplexer that lets you run multiple Claude Code sessions in a free-form 2D grid layout. Features include workspace management, broadcast mode, git manager, MCP server management, and a Bloomberg-inspired dark theme.
